headline: DuPont Achieves Renewable Power Milestone in US Healthcare Sites
summary: DuPont's U.S. healthcare manufacturing sites now run on renewable electricity, advancing climate goals and lowering emissions.

headline: DuPont de Nemours (DD) Stock Valuation Gap After Recent Pullback And PFAS Litigation Risks
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) has drawn fresh investor attention after its recent share move, with the stock up 4.0% in the latest session even though it is down about 7.3% over the past month. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. That jump in the latest session comes after a 7.3% decline in the 30 day share price return. However, the year to date share price return of 14.61% and 1 year total shareholder return of 66.66% suggest longer term momentum has recently been stronger than the...
